description: Square card. Background photo shows a poultry processing line: a worker in a blue smock, hairnet, face mask and gloves bent over a stainless-steel line handling raw chicken pieces in an industrial plant. Overlaid is a small navy 'LABOR NEWS' tab and a bold white sans-serif headline on translucent navy ribbon blocks: 'US Department of Labor reaches agreement with Perdue Farms and SMX staffing agency to address child labor violations.' A navy bar at lower right reads 'dol.gov/newsroom.'
notable_text: LABOR NEWS / US Department of Labor reaches agreement with Perdue Farms and SMX staffing agency to address child labor violations / dol.gov/newsroom
